title: Forgefix Multi-Purpose Pozi Screw CSK ST Black 5 x 30mm ForgePack 50, suitable for numerous ironmongery, joinery, electrical and plumbing applications.
features: COUNTERSUNK head with a black finish
SINGLE THREAD for high pull-out value and quick insertion
USED IN ALL TRADES, including joinery, electrical and plumbing
description: These Forgefix, Multi-Purpose Pozi Compatible Screws feature a countersunk, pozidrive compatible, recessed head. They have a black finish for improved corrosion resistance and aesthetic appearance. They offer quick and easy insertion due to an extra deep insert bit recess, enabling a firmer, more positive drive. The single thread, and special wax coating, increase speed and ease of insertion. The single thread design also provides increased holding power, particularly when used with particle boards like MDF. The Forgefix screws are highly versatile and immensely popular, these single thread screws are perfect for a whole host of fixing needs, and are ideal for fixing into a range of substrates including softwoods, hardwoods, chipboards and fibreboards. They are suitable for numerous ironmongery, joinery, electrical and plumbing applications. Supplied in a handy ForgePack. ForgePack of 50 ForgeFix Multi-Purpose Pozi Screws CSK ST Black 5.0 x 30mm
